summary: Confirmed no active auction deposits in DB (2 historical HOLD_BID txns totaling 2M were already REFUNDED/APPLIED). Fixed depositsHeld to sum Auction_Deposits with LOCKED/HELD_FOR_PAYMENT instead of all HOLD_BID forever. Revenue still excludes holds/refunds (only commission + admin revenue + forfeit). Backend restarted; API now returns depositsHeld=0.
